package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_context_timeout_allocated_per_inner_call: Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag context.WithTimeout creation inside tight retry loops when an outer deadline would suffice.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario505Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
